creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
As suggested I've added pre-packaged tarball into the latest release and some CI code to roll it up going forward.

You can find it here:

https://github.com/sippy/rtpproxy/releases/tag/v3.1.1
https://github.com/sippy/rtpproxy/releases/download/v3.1.1/rtpproxy-3.1.1.tar.gz

Thanks and I hope it helps.
